sevenDay.synopsis: The week is looking good with widespread VFR conditions expected all week. Surface winds will be a little gusty (G20kts) this afternoon and again Thursday afternoon. NEG hazards are expected. Rain chances return to the forecast this weekend, altho chances aren't overwhelming.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 20 APR - 26 APR
